events.title: Ravnedalen Live Thursday 16. July
events.description: Welcome to Ravnedalen Live 2026! For the ninth time, we will come together to create magic in Ravnedalen with artists, audience and crew in the world's most beautiful park. Preliminary programme -- Thursday, July 16: Highasakite, Ylvis, Bertine Zetlitz and RABO. More artists to be announced! We reserve the right to make changes to the programme. If one or more artists cancel, this does not entitle ticket holders to a refund. Event start / Concert start: 13:00 Doors open: 13:00 Duration: 660 minutes Food & Beverage: Kiosk Food Beer / Wine Age limit: 18+ Companion ticket: Free with a valid ticket (companion pays ticket fee only) Getting there: All buses, trains and ferries stop in Kristiansand city centre, approximately a 15-minute walk from Ravnedalen Nature Park. You can also take bus no. 15 (Tinnheia), no. 19 (Suldalen) or no. 30 (Vennesla) along Setesdalsveien and get off at the Grimsbrua stop. From there it is about a 5-minute walk. We encourage everyone to travel by public transport, bike or on foot <3 Wheelchair accessible: Yes Parking: No

events.title: Ravnedalen Live Festivalpass
events.description: Welcome to Ravnedalen Live 2026! For the ninth time, we will come together to create magic in Ravnedalen --- with artists, audience and crew --- in the world's most beautiful park. Line-up so far (more artists to be announced!): Thursday, July 16: Highasakite, Ylvis, Bertine Zetlitz and RABO Friday, July 17: Ari Bajgora, Ramón, Synne Vo, Musti, Funk For Forest and Paul Fjell Saturday, July 18: Patti Smith Quartet shares the stage with Tobias Sten, Julianna Riolino (CA) and Pumpegris We reserve the right to make changes to the programme. If one or more artists cancel, this does not entitle ticket holders to a refund. Event start: 13:00 Doors open: 13:00 Duration: 660 minutes Food & Beverage: Kiosk Food vendors Beer / Wine Age limit: 18+ Companion ticket: Free with a valid ticket (companion pays ticket fee only) Getting there: All buses, trains and ferries stop in Kristiansand city centre, approximately a 15-minute walk from Ravnedalen Nature Park. You can also take bus no. 15 (Tinnheia), no. 19 (Suldalen) or no. 30 (Vennesla) along Setesdalsveien and get off at Grimsbrua stop. From there it is about a 5-minute walk. We encourage everyone to travel by public transport, bike or on foot <3 Accessible for wheelchair users: Yes Parking: No

events.title: Ravnedalen Live Saturday 18. July

You can also take bus no. 15 (Tinnheia), no. 19 (Suldalen) or no. 30 (Vennesla) along Setesdalsveien and get off at the Grimsbrua stop. From there it is about a 5-minute walk.
